details.test: Task 1: Reserve two family-friendly Saturday tickets next month for $40 or less each
Task 2: Request an October weekday matinee group visit for 15 high school students to a Shakespeare play
Task 3: Save three past musical productions by the same director to Saved Productions list (adapted to available musicals)
Task 4: Subscribe to the newsletter with interests in Musicals and Youth & Family Programs
Task 5: Set up a $75 monthly donation dedicated to a youth education program
Task 6: Select accessible wheelchair and companion seats for an affordable ASL-interpreted performance
Task 7: Reserve a Wednesday evening audition slot for the Spring Musical
Task 8: Choose the best membership for two adults seeing at least four shows per year under $400
Task 9: Send a new play proposal message to the artistic team via the contact form
